input: The project deadline is next Friday. We need to complete the API integration and testing by Wednesday to leave buffer time for any issues.
expected_output: Deadline: Next Friday. Must complete API integration and testing by Wednesday for buffer time.

input: Our website has been experiencing slow load times over the past week. Investigation shows database queries are taking 3-5 seconds on average, particularly the user profile queries.
expected_output: Issue: Slow website (past week). Cause: Database queries taking 3-5 seconds, especially user profiles.

input: Customer feedback has been overwhelmingly positive. The main feature request is for a mobile app version of the platform.
expected_output: Feedback: Overwhelmingly positive. Top request: Mobile app version.

input: Security audit revealed three critical vulnerabilities in the authentication system. Immediate patching required before public launch.
expected_output: CRITICAL: 3 security vulnerabilities in authentication. Must patch before launch.

input: The new design mockups look great. Minor suggestion: increase the button size on mobile for better accessibility.
expected_output: Design approved. Suggestion: Larger mobile buttons for accessibility.
